poll.noCandidates: A poll must have at least one candidate.
poll.noTitle: A poll must have a title.
poll.minVotes: A poll must allow at least 1 vote.
poll.maxVotesLessThanOne: Max votes must be greater than 0.
poll.choiceMinCandidates: A choice poll must have at least two candidates.
poll.scoreStepValue: A scoring poll must have a step value higher than 0.
poll.categoryMinCategories: A categorization poll must have at least two categories.

vote.required: You must vote for this poll.
vote.minCandidates: You must vote for at least {{minVotes}} candidates.
vote.maxCandidates: You must vote for no more than {{maxVotes}} candidates.
vote.valueTooSmall: Your candidate's value can not be smaller than {{minValue}}.
vote.valueTooLarge: Your candidate's value can not be larger than {{maxValue}}.

hive.nameTooShort: Hive names must be at least 3 characters long.
hive.nameTooShortSettings: Hive name must be at least 3 characters long.

user.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters long.
user.tooYoung: You must be at least 13 years old.
user.tooOld: You can't be more than 130 years old.
